data_sources.name: Arkansas DH Tickborne Disease Interactive Dashboard
data_sources.description: County-level data for Alpha-gal, RMSF, Ehrlichiosis, Tularemia, etc. by year (2021–2025)
data_sources.notes: Goldmine — select county for exact numbers. Perfect for popups or layers.

data_sources.name: Alpha-gal Syndrome Arkansas Surveillance (2023–July 2025)
data_sources.notes: Northern AR hotspot data; demographics included

data_sources.name: Arkansas Alpha-gal Fact Sheet & Reporting
data_sources.description: Official ADH page + data download links

notes: One duplicate (2025 Lone Star Excel) was filtered out as it was already added in the previous expanded batch. These three new sources add excellent Arkansas county-level granularity, especially the interactive ArcGIS dashboard.
